full_text:
Wang Hong 王肱
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Hong (王肱). Sent by Liu Dai to replace the murdered Qiao Mao but struggled with bandits. Replaced by Cao Cao. Wang Hong was affiliated with Liu Dai.
